title: Exceptional Condition Handling - Error Leakage
goal: Trigger an application error and observe leaked information.

whyVulnerable.explanation: The application returned internal error details directly to the user.
whyVulnerable.answer: Internal errors should never be exposed publicly.

attackFlow.answer: Error messages revealed internal system structure.

secureFix.explanation: Applications should log errors internally but show generic messages to users.
secureFix.answer: Separate internal logging from user-facing responses.
